year.year: The calendar year to which the data point corresponds.

level_1.level_1: A primary categorical grouping or dimension for the data.

level_2.level_2: A secondary categorical grouping or sub‑dimension within the primary level.

value.value: The numerical measurement or metric associated with the given year and categorical levels.

month.month: The month in which the births occurred, likely indicating the time period of the data.

mother_occupation.mother_occupation: The occupation or employment status of the mother at the time of birth.

order.order: The birth order of the child, indicating whether it is the first, second, third, etc., child born to the mother.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births recorded for the given combination of month, mother occupation, and birth order.

year.year: The calendar year to which the income data pertains.

med_income_incl_empcpf.med_income_incl_empcpf: Median income including employer CPF contributions, reflecting total compensation before personal CPF deductions.

med_income_excl_empcpf.med_income_excl_empcpf: Median income excluding employer CPF contributions, representing take‑home pay before personal CPF deductions.

yr.yr: The calendar year to which the data pertains.

regrossed_bal_grp.regrossed_bal_grp: A grouping or category based on regrossed balance amounts.

no_of_active_mbrs.no_of_active_mbrs: The count of active members within the specified year and balance group.
